subtasks.description: Evaluate the engineer's deployment attempt against maintenance window policies and change management governance. Verify whether the 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday timestamp falls within an approved maintenance window for prod-us-east-1, and determine if an exception or escalation is required based on policy rules.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy evaluation task: The query describes a specific governance scenario—a deployment attempt outside an approved maintenance window. This is a straightforward policy compliance check against maintenance window and change management rules. A single policy_action subtask at small tier is sufficient: the decision is binary (in-window or out-of-window) with clear rule applicability. No multi-source reconciliation or complex data retrieval is needed; the policy registry lookup and rule evaluation are the core work.

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 has sufficient role permissions (POL-401 pass), but deployment timestamp 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday falls outside approved maintenance windows (POL-403: Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC only). POL-402 requires CAB approval for out-of-window production deployments. Escalation and CAB approval are mandatory before proceeding.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval obtained
Document business justification for out-of-window hotfix deployment
Require explicit CAB exception ticket before execution
